name: AG Mortgage Investment Trust Inc. 8.00% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock $0.01 par value per share
summary: AG Mortgage Investment Trust Inc. 8.00% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock $0.01 par value per share are preferred shares issued by AG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. These shares have a dividend rate that initially is fixed and subsequently converts to a floating rate, and they rank senior to common stock in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution. AG Mortgage Investment Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in a portfolio of residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS), other mortgage-related assets and commercial real estate.
